tldr: 5-layer composition of already-shipped building blocks (understand-anything graph + Ruflo agentdb + hive-mind_broadcast + cold-start phrase injection + Agent-tool swarm). No new infrastructure required.

operator_priority_case.fastest_path: Ship S4 (cold-start pre-warm) + S5 (swarm orchestrator) this loop; defer S1-S3 polish to follow-up iter.

sinister-os_owns: Reusable design for other projects (sinister-os will consume Sinister Sync when sanctum ships L4 cold-start injection)

freeze_diagnostic_dependency.required_ordering: 1) ship freeze-fix (F1-F2 from the other inbox row this turn). 2) then S4+S5 of Sinister Sync. Otherwise Sync swarm makes freeze worse.
